algorithmic_contract.exactness_rule: exact is propagated only from a backend row that independently verified the solution
algorithmic_contract.portfolio_order: try Nissy optimal table for a bounded interval, then fall back to resident H48
algorithmic_contract.runtime_claim: this artifact proves the recorded corpus, not every-state practical worst-case runtime
algorithmic_contract.state_scope: every physically valid 3x3 CubeState accepted by the local verifier
